# Raja Buffing Works

Industrial matte finishing and mirror polishing specialists based in Vasai East, Maharashtra. Serving cookware manufacturers, exporters, and commercial kitchenware operations since 1994.

## Core Services
- **Sauce Pot Buffing**: SS 304/316 mirror finishing for commercial kitchenware.
- **Milk Pot Polishing**: Dairy-grade buffing to Ra < 0.4μm.
- **Wok & Frying Pan Finishing**: Dual-finish protocol for high-heat utensils.
- **Silverware Restoration**: Low-heat soft-cloth protocol for hotelware.
- **Commercial Utensils**: High-volume job-work for catering batches (100 to 10,000+ units).
- **Matte Specialist Finishing**: Ra 0.5μm-0.8μm precision satin finishing on 8-unit dedicated array.

## Compliance
- **HSN Code**: 7323 (Table, kitchen or other household articles and parts thereof, of iron or steel).
- **GST**: Compliant B2B invoicing for Input Tax Credit (ITC).
- **Turnaround**: 24-48 hour dispatch for standard bulk batches.

## Contact Information
- **Phone**: +91 9096769473 / +91 9323269821
- **Email**: rajabuffingworks02@gmail.com
- **Location**: Behind Bengali Chawl, Naikpada, Vasai East, Palghar, Maharashtra - 401208
- **Website**: https://www.rajabuffing.shop

## Technical Knowledge Base
- SS 304 vs SS 316 Buffing Requirements
- HSN 7323 Job-Work Compliance Structure
- Ra Value Targeting for Matte Finishing
- Commercial Kitchenware Care Protocols
- GST Job-Work Challan Structure for Utensils
